completed: Hardened emailService.js with timeouts and atomic updates
Added 504 mapping for timeouts in errorHandler
pending: Monitor production logs for any remaining 502s

decisions.decision: Centralized list invalidation logic into cacheHooks.js instead of importing cache into models.
decisions.trade_offs: Adds a small amount of overhead to cacheHooks.js but prevents circular dependency and import errors.

decisions.decision: Switched to findOneAndUpdate with upsert for quota initialization.
decisions.trade_offs: Slightly more complex query but guarantees atomicity and prevents 11000 errors.
